name: polynomial_math_question2
user_a:
If x is the average (arithmetic mean) of m and 9, y is the average of 2m and 15, and z is the average of 3m and 18, what is the average of x, y, and z in terms of m?
A) m+6
B) m+7
C) 2m+14
D) 3m+21
